strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js/TypeScript and React, exceeding the 6+ year bar
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent Jest, Selenium course author)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the résumé
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or major cloud platforms (AWS CDK mentioned briefly; no GCP/Azure, no Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective self-hosting)
response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the 6+ years full-stack requirement with concrete TypeScript/Node.js/React delivery at Optilyz and RIDE, and uniquely matches the AI-agent requirement via MCP code generator work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is evidenced by authored Selenium curriculum and the Fluent-Asserts/Trial libraries, aligning with Vitest/Jest expectations. Gaps exist around Nest.js (not cited) and current Kotlin (Java appears only in older robotics/mobile orchestration roles), and cloud/containerization evidence is thin (AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes only on a personal project). Architecture and craftsmanship signals are strong (trunk-based dev, TDD, open-source platform ownership), supporting senior IC fit.
